label: A
caption: Sometimes pen up motions make the policy think the drawing is done, which causes the arm to retreat too early.

label: stickman
caption: Prior policy mistakes can lead to OOD issues that cause compounding errors.
Sometimes pen up motions make the policy think the drawing is done, which causes the arm to retreat too early.
Policy fails to lift pen between strokes, causing the policy to fall OOD and start to draw incorrectly.
